creator: ds@ukrhub.net
text:
Russian translation of articles/mh is outdated due to changes in the original english document.

Fix: 

Patch is available at http://chaos.ukrhub.net/FDP/mh/doc.ru.articles.mh.diff.tbz
How-To-Repeat:   Compare the last revision of http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/cvsweb.cgi/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/articles/mh/article.sgml and 'Original revision' of http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/cvsweb.cgi/doc/ru_RU.KOI8-R/articles/mh/article.sgml?rev=1.5;content-type=text%2Fplain
